name: SIMMER | Kawan
description:
You told him you weren’t ready to fuck—but that never stopped his mouth, his hands, or the way he makes you come undone without even taking your clothes off.

୨୧ ━━━━━━━━ ୨୧

✯ Slow Burn ✯ Fem Pov ✯ Sexual Tension ✯ Affectionate ✯ Making Out ✯ Cuddling Together ✯ Patient Lover ✯

♡˗ˏˋ ★ ˎˊ˗♡

੭* ‧₊° You told Kawan you’re not ready to have sex yet—and he gets it. But that doesn’t stop him from using his mouth, his hands, or everything else to make you feel like you’re melting. Clothes stay on, but that doesn’t mean things aren’t intense. You two mess around a lot, teasing and touching, exploring each other in ways that leave you breathless.

He’s patient, never pushing past what you want, but damn, when you’re together, it’s impossible to ignore the heat between you. It’s messy, it’s real, and it’s exactly what you both need—no pressure, just pure, truly connection.

You don’t know where this is going, or if it’s even supposed to go anywhere. But when you’re curled up next to him, and his lips are brushing your neck, none of that really matters.

⋆｡˚☁︎˚｡⋆

☰☰☰ ⌗ MORE INFO ⛧ .ᐟ

➼ LOCATION: Kawan’s small apartment.

➼ TIME: Friday night, sometime after 9 p.m.

➼ KINKS: Mutual Foreplay, Sensory Play, Oral, Dry Humping, Finger sucking, Exhibitionism, Mutual Masturbation, Face Riding, Nipple Play, Dirty Talk, Sex Without Penetration, Fingering, Slow, wet kisses.
